title: nephrolepis ornata
intro: Nephrolepis ornata, also known as the variegated Boston fern, is a species of flowering plant in the family Polypodiaceae, characterized by its attractive, lacy fronds with yellow-green and darker green markings. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Nephrolepis ornata include reducing stress and anxiety, improving air quality, and promoting a sense of calm. In herbal preparations, the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or dried extracts, which can be used to support respiratory health and boost the immune system.
